title: personal audio player
body:
Portable Audio Player

Carry your music with you.

Portable Audio Player lets you store and play music discs anywhere, without needing a jukebox. Whether you’re exploring, building, or just hanging out, your soundtrack follows you.

⸻

Features

* Portable music player item
* Store up to 28 discs inside the player
* Supports both vanilla music discs and AudioPlayer custom discs
* Play, pause, and control music directly from the item
* Private (headphones) mode or public (speaker) mode
* Random and shuffle-style playback
* Auto-play system that continues music seamlessly
* Live playback time display (current / total time)
* Full GUI for managing discs and controls

⸻

How It Works

* Right click to play or stop the current disc
* Sneak + right click to open the player GUI
* Insert discs into storage slots
* Use the controls to manage playback, mode, and shuffle

With auto-play enabled, the player will automatically move to the next disc when one finishes.

⸻

Multiplayer Friendly

* Each player has their own independent music
* Public mode allows nearby players to hear your music
* Private mode keeps it just for you

⸻

Requirements

* Fabric
* Fabric API
* AudioPlayer
* Simple Voice Chat

⸻

Notes

* Works with AudioPlayer custom audio discs
* Music follows the player instead of staying in one location
* Designed for both singleplayer and multiplayer use
